body.title: [dependency] Full autonomous E2E: Granny dispatches a real ticket -> DS.0 wakes -> builds -> closes
body.intention: I intend that the full autonomous pipeline runs unassisted end-to-end — Granny dispatches a real builder ticket, DS.0's front-door wakes it, DS.0 builds on Hex and CLOSES the ticket through the proof-on-close gate — so the CC.0+Akien-push / DS.0-build loop turns without me driving each step.
body.description:
The autonomous complement to T-ds-fullcycle-observe-run (which drives DS.0 directly). Prove the FULL loop through Granny: a real builder ticket -> Granny routes builder->DickSimnel.0 (fixed today, 27 tests green) -> DS.0 front-door wakes the device on the bus dispatch -> DS.0 builds on Hex -> _post_result closes (needs T-ds-listener-proof-on-close first, else it escalates at close). Prereqs to handle in the run: (a) DS.0's front-door must be RUNNING to receive the dispatch (shim owns startup — GL is passive; survey flagged the front-door isn't auto-started); (b) do it CONTROLLED — the sprint queue currently holds ~87 tickets (82 master/5 builder), so a blind Granny restart would churn them all; scope to a single builder ticket (e.g. T-ds-smoke-hello or the path-sweep), or gate the others, before restarting Granny; (c) Granny is currently self-parked (is_stalled) — resume + reload config. Gated on the close fix so the loop can actually COMPLETE.

**Affected files:** none new expected (integration run); any wake/front-door gap found gets its own fix.
**Design rules:** log-every-interface-crossing (dispatch/wake/close crossings); ground-loop-is-passive (front-door start is the shim's job, not GL).
**Scope boundary:** IN — a single controlled real ticket dispatched via Granny -> DS.0 wake -> build -> close, observed end-to-end. OUT — unleashing the full 87-ticket queue; the standing-CC.1 builder path.
**Test plan:** integration/observation — the dispatched ticket reaches status=closed via the Granny->DS.0->Hex->close path, with the handshake (dispatch->ack->done) logged; no manual step in the middle.
**Completion criteria:** a real ticket goes from Granny dispatch to closed via DS.0-on-Hex with zero manual intervention; the handshake + build + close are logged.
**Rollback:** n/a (observation); park Granny again after.

[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)

[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
